Appearances:
Plaintiff Cuizhu Yu is present.
Attorney Howard Newson Chung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wendy Wai Lau Lin is present.
Attorney James Maccoun appearing for the defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June 23, 2014 remains on calendar.
